name: Sentele Pro Pack
description: Registry of Sentele Pro marketplace templates. Functional equivalents NOT yet implemented — listed here so the user can swap to this set once page/database definitions are authored.

templates.title: Team Management
templates.note: Sentele alternative to Notion's company-pack. Schema not authored yet.

templates.title: Documents
templates.description: Document tracker — specs, ADRs, runbooks, contracts, briefs.
templates.schema: CREATE TABLE ("Title" TITLE, "Type" SELECT('Spec':blue, 'ADR':purple, 'Runbook':green, 'Contract':red, 'Brief':orange, 'Notes':gray, 'Other':default), "Status" STATUS, "Owner" PEOPLE, "Reviewers" PEOPLE, "Last Reviewed" DATE, "Next Review" DATE, "Tags" MULTI_SELECT('eng':blue, 'product':purple, 'design':pink, 'ops':orange, 'legal':red, 'security':gray), "Source" URL, "Doc ID" UNIQUE_ID PREFIX 'DOC')

templates.title: Projects & Tasks
templates.schema: CREATE TABLE ("Name" TITLE, "Type" SELECT('Project':purple, 'Task':blue, 'Subtask':gray), "Status" STATUS, "Priority" SELECT('P0':red, 'P1':orange, 'P2':yellow, 'P3':gray), "Owner" PEOPLE, "Due" DATE, "Project ID" UNIQUE_ID PREFIX 'P')

templates.title: Performance Reviews
templates.description: Performance review tracker. Sensitive data — verify access controls before populating.
templates.schema: CREATE TABLE ("Person" TITLE, "Cycle" SELECT('H1':blue, 'H2':purple, 'EOY':red), "Year" NUMBER, "Status" STATUS, "Manager" PEOPLE, "Self Review" URL, "Manager Review" URL, "Outcome" SELECT('Exceeds':green, 'Meets':blue, 'Below':red, 'Pending':gray))

templates.title: 1:1s
templates.note: Same shape as official.one_on_ones_hub. Reference content not authored yet — use official set or author alternative_sentele/one_on_ones_hub.md.
